summary: Frontend-only test of WelcomeGate with PushNotificationButton. Login as trial_test_wg@example.com triggered WelcomeGate. All required elements found in DOM with correct ordering (CTA -> push section -> WhatsApp footer). No runtime JS errors, no silent crash of PushNotificationButton.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WelcomeGate shows correctly for trial users with no subscription. PushNotificationButton renders inside WelcomeGate with data-testid='push-btn-denied' in chromium headless (permission denied). DOM order: welcome-activate-trial (idx 7501) -> push-btn-denied (idx 8699) -> WhatsApp footer (idx 9662). Intro text 'Attiva le notifiche per non perderti orari, cambi lezione e vincite alla lotteria!' visible. ATTIVA SETTIMANA DI PROVA button visible and clickable (not tested activation flow, only DOM presence as requested).
